summary: First comprehensive testing of school management app. Backend: 100% pass rate (17/17 tests). Frontend: Core flows working - login, dashboard, classes navigation, class/section detail views functional. Navigation issues after deep nesting. Metro disconnection observed during extended testing.

integration_issues.flow: Deep navigation (Dashboard → Classes → Class Detail → Section Detail → Back to tabs)
integration_issues.issue: Bottom tab navigation becomes unresponsive after deep navigation. get_by_role('tab') selectors timeout. Metro disconnection warning appears.
affected_testIDs: N/A - Expo Router tabs don't have explicit testIDs

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead
Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'

action_items: Add testID attributes to Expo Router Tabs for better testing (optional enhancement)
Fix deprecated shadow* props - replace with boxShadow throughout the app
Investigate Metro disconnection during extended sessions (may be environment-specific)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is 933 lines - should be split into separate modules (routes, models, utils)
All MongoDB _id fields are properly excluded using {'_id': 0} - GOOD
Email normalization (lowercase) is correctly implemented in auth endpoints
JWT authentication properly implemented with Bearer tokens
Password hashing with bcrypt is secure
Environment variables properly used for all URLs and credentials
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly from env
All interactive elements have proper testID attributes for testing
React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity) used correctly throughout
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test data: teachers (TEST_teacher_*, TEST_created_teacher_*), students (TEST_*), chat groups (TEST_Group_*). All prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend core flows work well (login, dashboard, classes, class detail, section detail). Issue: Deep navigation causes tab navigation to become unresponsive - may need back button implementation or better navigation state management. Metro disconnection warning appeared during extended testing but didn't break functionality. Deprecated style props (shadow*, pointerEvents) should be fixed for cleaner console output.

test_categories.authentication: 6/6 passed (login, register, token validation, unauthorized access)
test_categories.students: 2/2 passed (create with verification, list by section)

successful_flows: Dashboard stats display (3 Students, 3 Teachers, 10 Classes, 3 Pending)
Quick Actions buttons (Manage Teachers, View Classes, Group Chat)
Classes tab navigation and list display (10 classes)
Section detail view (students list, Enter Marks, Attendance buttons)
failed_flows: Chat tab navigation after deep nesting (timeout)
Profile tab navigation after deep nesting (timeout)
Teacher registration flow (couldn't test due to logout failure)
partially_tested: Manage Teachers screen (accessible from dashboard but not tested after deep navigation)
Marks entry flow (button visible but not clicked)
Attendance flow (button visible but not clicked)
